message:
fix(cli): fail closed on explicit-session project resolution instead of silently falling back to CWD

Many CLI commands were silently falling back to the caller's working
directory when asked to operate on an explicitly-named session whose
configured project directory could not be found. This could cause
commands like send, lock, handoff, context, rotate, watch, and others
to silently operate on the wrong project.

**Fail-closed resolution (util.go, ~20 call sites):**
Introduce resolveExplicitProjectDirForSession and
resolveCommandProjectDirForSession(session, inferred bool). Explicit
sessions must resolve to a saved/configured project directory or return
an error; only inferred sessions keep the old workspace-fallback. The
old resolveProjectDirForSession(session, true) pattern replaced across
add, assign, context, controller, ensemble, git, handoff, message,
pipeline, profile_switch, resume, root, rotate, send, session, summary,
watch, and worktrees.

**Saved session-agent identity plumbing (mail.go, locks.go, message.go):**
Commands that previously ignored saved SessionAgentInfo now consult it
for both project directory and agent name. New helpers
loadResolvedSessionAgent, resolveSessionPaneAgentName,
resolvePaneAgentName, resolveMailAgentIdentity, and
resolveAgentMailCommandScope. Mail ack/read/mark no longer require
--agent when a saved session agent is available. runLocks fails early
with clear error when no Agent Mail identity exists.

**spawn --resume source-project fix (resume.go, spawn.go):**
spawnWithHandoff rewritten to call spawnSessionLogic directly via new
SpawnOptions.ProjectDirOverride instead of cobra command lookup.
resolveResumeSourceProjectDir infers source project from handoff file
path. Monitor pkill pattern consolidated into monitorProcessPattern/
monitorProcessPatternForExecutable helpers.

**Persona user-config loading (persona.go):**
Replace single DefaultUserPath() with priority-ordered
userPathCandidates() list and LoadUserConfig() that fails hard on
corrupt config files. determineSource refactored into
determineSourceFromProjectDir to avoid CWD coupling.

**Watch isolation (watch.go):**
runFileWatch and runBeadWatch receive explicit watchRoot directory
(resolved via resolveWatchProjectDir) instead of watching ".".
New watchEventMatchesPattern helper centralizes path-relative matching.

**Comprehensive tests:**
New tests across assign_test, cli_test, ensemble_compare_test,
git_test, handoff_test, mail_inbox_test, mail_test, persona_spec_test,
rotate_test, send_test, spawn_test, spawn_recovery_test, summary_test,
util_test, validate_test, and watch_test covering all new resolution
paths and error conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1289,6 +1289,7 @@ func TestLoadRegistry_ProjectPersonaExtendsUserPersonaWithoutAgentType(t *testin
 		t.Fatal(err)
 	}
 	t.Setenv("XDG_CONFIG_HOME", xdgDir)
+	t.Setenv("NTM_CONFIG", filepath.Join(tmpDir, "custom-root", "config.toml"))
 
 	userContent := `
 [[personas]]
